name: Vivara Participacoes S.A.
summary: Vivara Participa√É¬ß√É¬µes S.A. operates a chain of jewelry stores. It offers a range of products, including jewelry, such as rings, earrings, necklaces, pendants, bracelets, chains, and pins. The company also provides various accessories, such as cufflinks, bags and backpacks, notebooks, pens, wallets, keychains, belts, cases, sunglasses, folders, perfumes, card holders, jewel boxes, passport holders, clock holders, note fasteners, mechanical pencils, and refills and cartridges, as well as watches. As of December 31, 2019, it operated 191 Vivara stores, 6 Life stores, and 56 kiosks. The company also sells its products through online. Vivara Participa√É¬ß√É¬µes S.A. was founded in 1962 and is based in Sao Paulo, Brazil.
